zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich von Blieskastel於1180年出生在德國貝也時，他的父親Folmar II. von Blieskastel30歲，母親Jutta von Saarbrücken27歲。他和Agnes von Sayn至少有4個女兒。他去世於1237年12月13日之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich von Blieskastel于1180年出生在德国貝也时，他的父亲Folmar II. von Blieskastel30岁，母亲Jutta von Saarbrücken27岁。他和Agnes von Sayn至少有4个女儿。他去世于1237年12月13日之前。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich von Blieskastel was born in 1180, in Bavaria, Germany, his father, Folmar II. von Blieskastel, was 30 and his mother, Jutta von Saarbrücken, was 27. He had at least 4 daughters with Agnes von Sayn. He died before 13 December 1237.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich von Blieskastel est né en 1180, à Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Folmar II. von Blieskastel, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Jutta von Saarbrücken, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 filles avec Agnes von Sayn. Il est décédé avant 13 décembre 1237.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich von Blieskastel 1180 in Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Folmar II. von Blieskastel 30 und seine Mutter Jutta von Saarbrücken 27. Er hatte mit Agnes von Sayn mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb vor 13. Dezember 1237.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich von Blieskastel è nato il nel 1180 nel Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Folmar II. von Blieskastel, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Jutta von Saarbrücken, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figlie con Agnes von Sayn. Morì prima del 13 dicembre 1237.

ja.Blieskastel, Saar-Pfalz-Kreis, Territoir: ドイツサアルランドサアルプファルズ-クレイスブリースカステル
ja.lifeSummary: Heinrich von Blieskastelが1180年にドイツバイエルンで生まれた時，父Folmar II. von Blieskastelは30歳，母Jutta von Saarbrückenは27歳であった。彼はAgnes von Saynとの間に少なくとも4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1237年12月13日以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich von Blieskastel(이)가 1180년 독일 베이른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Folmar II. von Blieskastel(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Jutta von Saarbrücken(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Agnes von Sayn(와)과 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1237년 12월 13일 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich von Blieskastel nasceu em 1180, em Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Folmar II. von Blieskastel, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Jutta von Saarbrücken, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhas com Agnes von Sayn. Ele faleceu antes 13 de dezembro de 1237.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich von Blieskastel родился в 1180 г. в местности беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Folmar II. von Blieskastel было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Jutta von Saarbrücken, 27. У него было по крайней мере 4 дочери от Agnes von Sayn. Он умер перед 13 декабрь 1237 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heinrich von Blieskastel nació en 1180, en Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Folmar II. von Blieskastel, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Jutta von Saarbrücken, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijas con Agnes von Sayn. Murió antes de 13 de diciembre de 1237.
